programme.title: Web of Lies 3
programme.desc: Dark stories that serve as a warning against making friends in cyberspace.The characters of the series are people who fell into the trap of dangerous criminals looking for victims on the Internet.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Extremely experienced crime journalists reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Extremely experienced crime journalists reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a New York Times journalist and author of best-selling novels, returns to the most famous crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Jones conducts his own investigations and reveals unknown facts that have escaped the attention of investigators and prosecutors.To get a full picture of the crime, he talks to the victims' families, representatives of the justice system and serving convicts.Jones deals with, among others:the famous case of the murder of millionaire Bill McLaughlin, in which charges were brought against football player Erick Naposki, and the controversial trial of infanticide Casey Anthony.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a New York Times journalist and author of best-selling novels, returns to the most famous crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Jones conducts his own investigations and reveals unknown facts that have escaped the attention of investigators and prosecutors.To get a full picture of the crime, he talks to the victims' families, representatives of the justice system and serving convicts.Jones deals with, among others:the famous case of the murder of millionaire Bill McLaughlin, in which charges were brought against football player Erick Naposki, and the controversial trial of infanticide Casey Anthony.

programme.title: The Big Swindle
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: The Big Swindle
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the most stunning and thrilling courtroom moments caught on camera.

programme.title: Shattered 3
programme.desc: Viewers will see what impact cruel crimes and offenses have on the lives of victims and witnesses, as well as what the consequences are for those involved.

programme.title: Shattered 3
programme.desc: Viewers will see what impact cruel crimes and offenses have on the lives of victims and witnesses, as well as what the consequences are for those involved.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: A series of programs presenting authentic stories of people who disappeared in strange circumstances, and during the investigation it turned out that they were murdered by family members, friends or neighbors whom they had known for years.Murders committed by people close to the victim occur much more often than is commonly believed.Investigations in such cases are difficult and often lead to shocking conclusions.The program used police photos and recordings, and a number of interviews were held with the victims' families.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: A series of programs presenting authentic stories of people who disappeared in strange circumstances, and during the investigation it turned out that they were murdered by family members, friends or neighbors whom they had known for years.Murders committed by people close to the victim occur much more often than is commonly believed.Investigations in such cases are difficult and often lead to shocking conclusions.The program used police photos and recordings, and a number of interviews were held with the victims' families.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Extremely experienced crime journalists reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: How (Not) to Get Rid of a Body
programme.desc: The program shows the extremes to which murderers can go to avoid punishment.Each episode presents the stories of criminals who will do anything to hide their crimes and get rid of their victims.

credits.actor: Self - Former Prosecutor Cuyahoga County Prosecutors Office - Tim McGinty

programme.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Homicide Lieutenant Joe Kenda returns to cases that seem more like a movie script than a real investigation.He reconstructs the course of the crime, revealing the motives of the perpetrators.

programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.desc: A series of programs presenting authentic stories of people who disappeared in strange circumstances, and during the investigation it turned out that they were murdered by family members, friends or neighbors whom they had known for years.Murders committed by people close to the victim occur much more often than is commonly believed.Investigations in such cases are difficult and often lead to shocking conclusions.The program used police photos and recordings, and a number of interviews were held with the victims' families.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: A series of programs presenting authentic stories of people who disappeared in strange circumstances, and during the investigation it turned out that they were murdered by family members, friends or neighbors whom they had known for years.Murders committed by people close to the victim occur much more often than is commonly believed.Investigations in such cases are difficult and often lead to shocking conclusions.The program used police photos and recordings, and a number of interviews were held with the victims' families.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: US police officers use personal cameras to record dramatic and tense pursuits of murderers.They reveal the behind-the-scenes of investigations.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes 2
programme.desc: Police officers and investigators reveal the behind-the-scenes of their work thanks to recordings from personal cameras.Viewers will see dramatic and tense plot twists in the pursuit of criminals and even murderers.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade
programme.desc: The 1980s are primarily associated with big money and strong characters.The series shows the dark side of this decade in the USA.The country was then hit by the largest crime wave in history.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade
programme.desc: The 1980s are primarily associated with big money and strong characters.The series shows the dark side of this decade in the USA.The country was then hit by the largest crime wave in history.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You 2
programme.desc: Stories of people who committed crimes in the name of love.It turns out that a man in love is not fully sane.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You 2
programme.desc: Stories of people who committed crimes in the name of love.It turns out that a man in love is not fully sane.

programme.title: Disappeared 9
programme.desc: The creators of the program present investigations into mysterious disappearances.Some searches end happily, others have a tragic ending.Each episode is devoted to one missing person.

programme.title: Disappeared 9
programme.desc: The creators of the program present investigations into mysterious disappearances.Some searches end happily, others have a tragic ending.Each episode is devoted to one missing person.
